summary: Sprint pivot confirmed. #1182 (agent-identity bridge) closed via PR #1212. New sprint: #1202 (AAB normalization, ~700 false denials/day), #1209 (MCP prefix match, ~1h fix), #1208 (heredoc FP verify), #1139 (date scanner). Senior to start with #1209 then #1202 (KE-2 flagship). PR #1225 (prior EM report) CI green, awaiting approval. P0 #1186 (swarm health) third consecutive cycle — escalated to director, human intervention required.

prs.action: Awaiting approval — no code changes, safe to merge when approved

closedThisCycle.title: [dogfood] agent-identity-bridge blocked by No Governance Self-Modification invariant
closedThisCycle.note: Fixed: persona.env operational exemption added. Confirmed closed.

newAssignments.title: [dogfood] github-mcp-server-actions_list blocked despite mcp.call github-mcp-server allow rule
newAssignments.note: Quick win warm-up. Root cause: aab.ts does exact match on MCP server name. Fix: change to startsWith() so github-mcp-server-actions_list matches github-mcp-server allow rule.

newAssignments.title: Governance gap: AAB action-type normalization failure causing 3,825+ unintended default-deny decisions
newAssignments.note: KE-2 flagship. 3,825 unknown-type denials in 5.5 days = ~700/day. Fix: prefix stripping (rtk/time/timeout), compound command classification, UnknownActionType WARNING event.

newAssignments.title: [dogfood] Heredoc with governance-protected path strings triggers false-positive block
newAssignments.note: Verify if #1212 already fixed. If commandViolation in definitions.ts:1229-1232 still does full-string includes on command body, patch to check actual write target path.

newAssignments.title: [dogfood] Safe date command substitution blocked as dangerous shell expansion
newAssignments.note: Add read-only subshell allowlist in packages/matchers/src/command-scanner.ts for $(date +format) pattern.

notableIssues.title: Swarm Health Alert — 2026-03-28
notableIssues.label: priority:P0
notableIssues.note: 85.7% stuck rate, 18 dead PIDs, 2 cron collisions, 4x oversubscription. Third cycle. Human required.

blockers.description: Swarm P0 unresolved for 3 cycles — ops/director owner, human required

escalations.description: Swarm health P0 persists for third consecutive cycle. 12 agents stuck >4h, 18 dead PIDs, 2 cron collisions, 133 agents vs 32 max_workers. Human must intervene.
recommendedActions: git worktree prune to clear 12 stale stuck worktrees
Clean up 18 dead PID files in /tmp/
Fix cron collisions in server/schedule.json (0 6 * * * and 45 */6 * * * slots)
Address 4x oversubscription: 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers

testHealth.note: Last QA run 2026-03-28T06:50Z. +30 tests vs prior baseline (4364->4394). No regressions.

sprintStatus.newGoal: Fix AAB normalization gap (#1202 KE-2) + MCP prefix match (#1209) + heredoc FP (#1208) + date scanner (#1139)
sprintStatus.remainingWork: Senior to start #1209 (warm-up ~1h) then #1202 (KE-2 design + impl 3-5d). #1208 and #1139 in parallel.

escalationRules.notes: persistentBlocker triggered for #1186 (3rd cycle). Escalated to director. No code escalations.

dogfoodObservations.description: rtk git * commands classified as unknown action type — every EM workflow using rtk wrapper false-denies. Confirmed live.
dogfoodObservations.suggestedFix: Strip rtk/time/timeout prefixes in aab.ts before action classification

dogfoodObservations.description: All github-mcp-server-* MCP tools blocked despite allow rule. Exact-match vs startsWith issue.
dogfoodObservations.suggestedFix: Change exact match to startsWith() for MCP server name matching in aab.ts

dogfoodObservations.description: Writing heredoc containing governance path strings to /tmp blocked — actual target is /tmp, commandViolation check too broad.
dogfoodObservations.suggestedFix: Scope commandViolation to actual write target path, not full command body text

dogfoodObservations.description: $(date +format) blocked as dangerous shell expansion. Low severity but high frequency.
dogfoodObservations.suggestedFix: Add read-only subshell allowlist for $(date +format) in command-scanner.ts
